CustomField.formula: AND( !Tacit_Decline__c, RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Auto_Renewal_Opportunity', Account.Auto_Renew__c, !IsClosed, DATEVALUE(Policy_Inception_Date__c) - TODAY() <= 6, DATEVALUE(Policy_Inception_Date__c) > TODAY() )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates an Open Auto Renew Opportunity that hasn't been Closed Won 6 days before expiry and hasn't already been processed
CustomField.label: Failed Payment
